title: phleum pratense f. fallax
intro: Phleum pratense f. fallax, also known as fall meadowgrass, is a variant of the perennial grass species Phleum pratense. This plant is used in herbal medicine, primarily due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of fall meadowgrass include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, fall meadowgrass is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused in oil to create topical creams and salves.
